testcase.name: test_membersOf_non_this_hides_private_members

failure.message: OutlineMeta should store _age for internal this. access ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: OutlineMeta should store _age for internal this. access ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at testcase.name: test_membersOf_outline_stores_private_members_for_this_access

failure.message: Private '_age' must be stored in OutlineMeta.members() for this. access ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Private '_age' must be stored in OutlineMeta.members() for this. access ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at
